title: Time tracking records

posts.author: Vahid (Vahid Davani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday.com
We would like to see when users click on stop or start time tracking , to change status regarding to this action - (I know we could use status to start and stop time tracking)
The reason why we need this , cause later on we could follow the person whom did done a same tasks in different time !
waiting for your reply
thanks
